subject: [RFC PATCH 37/40] mm: page_alloc: move spb_get_category and spb_tainted_reserve to mmzone.h

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch moves two helper functions, `spb_get_category` and `spb_tainted_reserve`, from `mm/page_alloc.c` to `include/linux/mmzone.h`. The move is done to keep a single source of truth for these functions, which will be needed in multiple places including `mm/compaction.c`. The functions remain unchanged semantically. They are used to classify superpageblocks as clean or tainted based on their contents and to calculate the minimum reserve required by a tainted superpageblock to maintain allocatability without tainting fresh clean superpageblocks.
